name: Buckner Park
description: Buckner Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Dickson, TN. There are 2 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. The courts are free.

name: Tennsco Park
description: Tennsco Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Dickson, TN. There are 3 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. The courts are free. You can’t reserve the courts.
